metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Audit Event ASIM parser for SQLSecurityAudit Logs
properties.query:
let parser=(disabled:bool=false){
  let SqlAuditEventTypeLookup = datatable (ActionType:string, EventType:string)
  [
    "SELECT", "Read",
    "EXECUTE", "Execute",
    "INSERT", "Create",
    "UPDATE", "Set",
    "DELETE", "Delete",
    "CREATE", "Create",
    "ALTER", "Set",
    "DROP", "Delete",
    "GRANT", "Set",
    "DENY", "Set",
    "REVOKE", "Set",
    "BATCH", "Execute",
    "LOGIN", "Execute",
    "LOGOUT", "Execute",
    "ENABLE", "Enable",
    "DISABLE", "Disable",
    "BACKUP", "Read",
    "RESTORE", "Set",
    "RENAME", "Set",
    "TRUNCATE", "Delete",
    "OPEN", "Execute",
    "CLOSE", "Execute",
    "FETCH", "Read",
    "RECEIVE", "Read"
  ];
  let SqlSecurityAuditDedicated = 
    SQLSecurityAuditEvents
    | where not(disabled)
    | project-rename
        SrcIpAddr = ClientIp,
        EventOriginalType = ActionName
    | extend
        EventOriginalUid = tostring(EventId),
        ActorUsername = ServerPrincipalName,
        ActorUserId = tostring(ServerPrincipalId),
        Object = ObjectName,
        Operation = EventOriginalType,
        ActorSessionId = tostring(SessionId),
        EventResult = iff(Succeeded == true, "Success", "Failure"),
        TargetAppName = strcat(LogicalServerName, "/", DatabaseName),
        AdditionalInfo = bag_pack(
            "Statement", Statement,
            "SchemaName", SchemaName,
            "DurationMs", DurationMs,
            "AffectedRows", AffectedRows,
            "ResponseRows", ResponseRows,
            "ApplicationName", ApplicationName,
            "ClassTypeDescription", ClassTypeDescription,
            "HostName", HostName
        )
    ;
  let SqlSecurityAuditDiag =
    AzureDiagnostics
    | where not(disabled)
    | where Category == "SQLSecurityAuditEvents"
    | project-rename
        SrcIpAddr = client_ip_s,
        EventOriginalType = action_name_s
    | extend
        EventOriginalUid = tostring(event_id_g),
        ActorUsername = server_principal_name_s,
        ActorUserId = tostring(server_principal_id_d),
        Object = object_name_s,
        Operation = EventOriginalType,
        ActorSessionId = tostring(session_id_d),
        EventResult = iff(succeeded_s == "true", "Success", "Failure"),
        TargetAppName = strcat(LogicalServerName_s, "/", database_name_s),
        AdditionalInfo = bag_pack(
            "Statement", statement_s,
            "SchemaName", schema_name_s,
            "DurationMs", duration_milliseconds_d,
            "AffectedRows", affected_rows_d,
            "ResponseRows", response_rows_d,
            "ApplicationName", application_name_s,
            "ClassTypeDescription", class_type_description_s,
            "HostName", host_name_s
        )
    ;
  union isfuzzy=true SqlSecurityAuditDedicated, SqlSecurityAuditDiag
  | extend
      EventCount = int(1),
      EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventProduct = "SQL Audit Logs",
      EventVendor = "Microsoft",
      EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.0",
      EventSchema = "AuditEvent",
      TargetAppType = "SaaS application",
      ObjectType = "Cloud Resource",
      ActorUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(ActorUsername), "Simple", ""),
      ActorUserIdType = iff(isnotempty(ActorUserId), "Other", ""),
      EventSeverity = iff(EventResult == "Failure", "Low", "Informational")
  // Map EventType from action name
  | extend ActionType = toupper(tostring(split(Operation, " ")[0]))
  | lookup SqlAuditEventTypeLookup on ActionType
  | extend EventType = iff(isempty(EventType), "Other", EventType)
  // Recommended fields
  | extend
      EventUid = EventOriginalUid,
      EventResultDetails = iff(EventResult == "Failure", "Other", "")
  // Aliases
  | extend
      IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
      User = ActorUsername,
      Application = TargetAppName,
      Dst = TargetAppName,
      Src = SrcIpAddr,
      Dvc = EventProduct,
      AdditionalFields = AdditionalInfo
  | project
      Type,
      TimeGenerated,
      EventOriginalUid,
      EventUid,
      EventResult,
      EventResultDetails,
      EventSeverity,
      EventCount,
      EventStartTime,
      EventEndTime,
      EventProduct,
      EventVendor,
      EventSchemaVersion,
      EventSchema,
      EventType,
      EventOriginalType,
      Operation,
      Object,
      ObjectType,
      TargetAppName,
      TargetAppType,
      ActorUsername,
      ActorUsernameType,
      ActorUserId,
      ActorUserIdType,
      ActorSessionId,
      SrcIpAddr,
      AdditionalFields,
      IpAddr,
      User,
      Application,
      Dst,
      Src,
      Dvc
};
parser(disabled=disabled)
